markets.question: Spread: Portland Timbers (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Portland Timbers" if Portland Timbers win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Houston Dynamo".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: Houston Dynamo vs. Portland Timbers - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the MLS game, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 PM ET.

markets.question: Houston Dynamo vs. Portland Timbers: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Houston Dynamo and Portland Timbers, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Houston Dynamo and Portland Timbers combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Houston Dynamo vs. Portland Timbers: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Houston Dynamo and Portland Timbers, scheduled for March 14 at 8:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Houston Dynamo and Portland Timbers each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).
